title: citrus boholensis
intro: Citrus boholensis, also known as the Calamansi or Philippine lime, is a small evergreen tree or shrub native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its high content of vitamin C and flavonoids, making it an effective antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Citrus boholensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the fruit of Citrus boholensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and juices, which can be consumed fresh or used as a flavoring agent in various dishes.
